title: create-presentation choose-capability task_framing_issue
summary: Agent was asked to create a presentation but received no content outline, speaker notes, or design preferences. Multiple attempts to generate content were all rejected.

evidence.desired_outcome: Generate a slide deck for a quarterly business review.
evidence.symptom: Every generated slide deck is rejected by the user for being too generic, wrong tone, or missing key metrics.
evidence.context: The user's request was a single sentence: 'Create a Q4 review deck.' No outline, no data, no design preferences were provided.
evidence.failed_step: Generated three different slide deck drafts, all rejected
reproduction_steps: Generated generic Q4 deck — rejected as too generic
Tried more data-heavy approach — rejected for wrong tone
Switched to markdown slides — rejected for wrong format

inference.why_current_path_failed: The task is underspecified. The agent cannot produce a satisfactory presentation without knowing the audience, key metrics, design preferences, or outline. Continuing to generate drafts is wasted effort.
inference.best_candidate_route_detail: Ask the user for: (1) key metrics or data points to include, (2) target audience, (3) preferred tone and design style, (4) any existing outline or reference deck.

resolution.follow_up_notes: User provided an outline and three key metrics. Presentation generated successfully on second attempt.
